---
title: "mod viz"
data: "2026-05-10"
---

# preamble and loading

```{r pathfinding}
here::i_am("_mod/scripts/analysis-viz.Rmd")
```

```{r load libs}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)

# library(patchwork) # for plot_layout
# 
# library(survival) # for fitting surv objects
# library(survminer) # for plotting surv ojects

source(here("_mod/scripts/wrangle.R"))
```

```{r load data}
source(here("_mod/scripts/R/tidy.R"))

dfs_tidy <- dfs_tidy %>%
  lapply(., \(x){
    x %>% mutate(across(starts_with("trt"), as.factor))
  }
         #mutate(across(starts_with("trt"), as.factor))
         )
```

# development stuff

## survival

## pup growth

```{r}
# df prep

df <- dfs_tidy$long %>%
  filter(trt.type == "dev",
         is.sup != 1) %>%
  PrepDevSS() %>%
  filter(!(instar %in% c("24d", "48d", "24h", "48h", "transfer"))) %>%
  mutate(instar = factor(instar, levels = c("pmd", "hatch", "2nd", "3rd", "4th", "5th", "6th", "wander", "pupa"))) %>%
  filter(!(instar %in% c("hatch", "pmd", "2nd", "wander", "pupa")))

```

```{r}
.plotfn <- function(x){
  x %>%
    ggplot(aes(col = trt.maxT, lty = trt.flucT,
             group = interaction(trt.meanT, trt.flucT))) +
    geom_point(#aes(alpha = n),
               size = 2) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_hue(direction = -1) +
  theme_bw()
}
```

```{r}
df %>%
  .plotfn() +
  aes(y = avg.logmass, x = avg.tt,
      shape = instar) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = avg.logmass + se.logmass,
                    ymin = avg.logmass - se.logmass),
                width = 0.2, lty = "solid", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmax = avg.tt + se.tt,
                     xmin = avg.tt - se.tt),
                 height = 0.1, lty = "solid", show.legend = FALSE)


df %>%
  .plotfn() +
  aes(y = avg.logmass, x = instar,
      shape = trt.flucT) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = avg.logmass + se.logmass,
                    ymin = avg.logmass - se.logmass),
                width = 0.1, lty = "solid", show.legend = FALSE)

df %>%
  .plotfn() +
  aes(y = avg.tt, x = instar,
      shape = trt.flucT) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = avg.tt + se.tt,
                    ymin = avg.tt - se.tt),
                width = 0.1, lty = "solid", show.legend = FALSE)

```



# tdt stuff
```{r}
# df prep
df <- dfs_tidy$wide %>%
  filter(trt.type == "tdt",
         #instar %in% c("0h", "24h", "48h", "pmd")
         ) %>%
  PrepTDTSS()
```

```{r}
df %>%
  filter(instar == "24h") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = avg.dmass, y = avg.exit,
             #lty = cohort,
             col = trt.maxT, shape = trt.flucT)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = avg.exit + se.exit,
                    ymin = avg.exit - se.exit),
                width = 5) +
  # geom_errorbarh(aes(xmax = avg.dmass + se.dmass,
  #                    xmin = avg.dmass - se.dmass)) +
  scale_color_hue(direction = -1) +
  theme_bw() +
      labs(y = "days survived after transferring",
       x = "mass diff. 24h after transferring")

# 2x2
df %>%
  filter(instar == "24h") %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = avg.exit, x = trt.maxT,
             #x = trt.meanT, shape = trt.maxT,
             col = trt.flucT, lty = trt.flucT, group = trt.flucT)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  #facet_wrap(~cohort) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = avg.exit + se.exit,
                    ymin = avg.exit - se.exit),
                width = 0.25
                ) +
  scale_color_hue(direction = -1) +
  theme_bw() +
    labs(y = "days survived after transferring",
       x = "max temp")

df %>%
  filter(instar == "24h") %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = avg.dmass, x = trt.maxT,
             #x = trt.meanT, shape = trt.maxT,
             col = trt.flucT, lty = trt.flucT, group = trt.flucT)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_line() +
  #facet_wrap(~cohort) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = avg.dmass + se.dmass,
                    ymin = avg.dmass - se.dmass),
                width = 0.25
                ) +
  scale_color_hue(direction = -1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y = "mass diff. 24h after transferring",
       x = "max temp")

# some more
df %>%
  filter(instar %in% c("24h", "48h")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = avg.dmass, x = instar,
             shape = trt.maxT, col = trt.maxT, 
             lty = trt.flucT, 
             group = interaction(trt.flucT, trt.maxT))) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = avg.dmass + se.dmass,
                    ymin = avg.dmass - se.dmass),
                width = 0.25, lty = "solid", show.legend = FALSE
                ) +
  scale_color_hue(direction = -1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y = "change in mass (mg)",
       x = "h after transferring",
       #col = "fluctuation", lty = "fluctuation",
       #shape = "max temp"
       )

df %>%
  filter(instar %in% c("24h", "48h")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = avg.rmass, x = instar,
             shape = trt.maxT, col = trt.maxT, 
             lty = trt.flucT, 
             group = interaction(trt.flucT, trt.maxT))) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = avg.rmass + se.rmass,
                    ymin = avg.rmass - se.rmass),
                width = 0.25, lty = "solid", show.legend = FALSE
                ) +
  scale_color_hue(direction = -1) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("24h" = "24:0", "48h" = "48:24")) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y = "mass ratio",
       x = "final h:initial h"
       )
```
